---
title: "Exam"
description: |
  What have you learned?
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

![<span>Photo by <a href="https://unsplash.com/@siora18?utm_source=unsplash&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_content=creditCopyText">Siora Photography</a> on <a href="https://unsplash.com/s/photos/reading?utm_source=unsplash&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_content=creditCopyText">Unsplash</a></span>](photos/siora-photography-hgFY1mZY-Y0-unsplash.jpg)

# Assessment

You can find information about the location and time of the exam in the [course directory](https://vorlesungsverzeichnis.unibas.ch/de/vorlesungsverzeichnis?id=293356). 

The exam will consist of ca. 20 multiple-choice questions. The majority of questions will cover content from the first part of the course (sessions 1-5), while a smaller portion (ca. 10%) will focus on content from the second part of the course (sessions 6-12).
